indications.text:
Nepafenac ophthalmic suspension, 0.3% is indicated for the treatment of pain and inflammation
associated with cataract surgery.

ILEVROTM (nepafenac ophthalmic suspension), 0.3% is indicated for the treatment of pain and
inflammation associated with cataract surgery.
